registry_content:
---
name: ai-native-pm-agent
description: |
  基于《AI Native 产品方法论》五书合一的 AI 产品全生命周期编排系统
version: 1.1
author: Max

# 五本书对应关系:
# 《AI Native 产品方法论》 → P1-P2 方向定界与实验
# 《AI Native 系统构建》 → P3-P5 系统构建
# 《AI Native 用户体验》 → P8 UX设计
# 《AI Native 审计与放行》 → P9-P10 审计放行
# 《AI Native 商业模式》 → P6 商业模式
# 《AI Native 营销与增长》 → P7 增长策略

skills:
  # 编排器
  - name: ai-native-pm-agent
    description: 主编排器，负责阶段路由、冲突检测、产品上下文管理
    stage: orchestrator
    path: orchestrator/SKILL.md
    
  # 《AI rebuild product needs》 - 需求发现工具箱
  - name: p0-needs-orchestrator
    description: 需求发现编排器：协调六个工具卡完成系统性需求发现
    stage: p0
    path: skills/p0-needs-orchestrator/SKILL.md
    
  - name: p0a-micro-needs-detector
    description: 微需求五问检测器：发现被忽视的微需求
    stage: p0a
    path: skills/p0a-micro-needs-detector/SKILL.md
    
  - name: p0b-real-needs-validator
    description: 真需求判断五问：区分真需求与伪需求
    stage: p0b
    path: skills/p0b-real-needs-validator/SKILL.md
    
  - name: p0c-needs-decomposer
    description: 需求四层拆解卡：表达层/场景层/处境层/代价层
    stage: p0c
    path: skills/p0c-needs-decomposer/SKILL.md
    
  - name: p0d-needs-archaeologist
    description: 需求考古五步法：挖掘深层需求与历史约束
    stage: p0d
    path: skills/p0d-needs-archaeologist/SKILL.md
    
  - name: p0e-good-question-generator
    description: 好问题六维观察表：从六个维度发现好问题
    stage: p0e
    path: skills/p0e-good-question-generator/SKILL.md
    
  - name: p0f-agent-boundary-designer
    description: Agent 边界清单：定义 AI 应该做/不做/停下来等人的边界
    stage: p0f
    path: skills/p0f-agent-boundary-designer/SKILL.md
    
  # 《AI Native 产品方法论》 - 需求与方向
  - name: ai-native-product-needs
    description: 需求发现与伪需求检测（综合版）
    stage: p0-legacy
    path: skills/p0-product-needs/SKILL.md
    
  - name: ai-native-direction-framing
    description: 方向定界：五维判断、Direction Brief
    stage: p1
    path: skills/p1-direction-framing/SKILL.md
    
  - name: ai-native-experiment-engine
    description: 实验展开：能力/产品/商业三层实验（总览包覆版，建议优先使用子技能）
    stage: p2
    path: skills/p2-experiment-engine/SKILL.md
